description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The front facade features a garage on the left, a central entrance, and large windows that allow ample natural light into the living spaces. The property is bordered by a low hedge and includes a small front lawn with a tree, while the rear of the house opens to a patio area with a circular hot tub and additional seating. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored brick, and the windows are framed in dark metal, giving the house a contemporary appearance. The interior layout is open, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as private rooms. The driveway and walkways are paved, providing easy access to the entrance and garage.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a landscaped yard featuring a patio and hot tub. The exterior is finished in light brick with dark window frames, giving it a contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entrance, large windows, front lawn, and a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and the driveway extending to the street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, circular hot tub, and large glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain brick wall, side windows, and the driveway leading to the garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and rear windows
